name: One-Dish Pork Chops with Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 3/4 lb hot sausage instead of pork chops if you prefer.
2. Heat oil in a skillet that can go into the oven; add onions, green peppers, and rice.
3. Saute until rice is translucent.
4. Add sugar and tomatoes, blending them together.
5. Place pork chops on top and then sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
6. Bake, covered, in a preheated 350°F (175°C) oven for about 1 hour.
7. Uncover the dish and carefully stir the rice mixture after 50 minutes.
8. Yield: 4 servings.
